llm_response:
Subject: Starting a New Book Club with Friends

I am excited to propose forming a new book club with you and a few other friends who love reading together. This book club aims to create a fun space where we can share our favorite stories and discuss the themes that resonate with us all.

The main purpose of this group is to meet monthly, pick a new book, and enjoy lively conversations without any pressure or complex rules. Key details include: we will meet once a month at a local coffee shop for about two hours. Key details include: each participant will choose one book to read before our next gathering arrives. Key details include: we will rotate the role of discussion leader so everyone gets a chance to guide the conversation.

Please let me know if you are interested in joining this book club or if you have any questions about how it works. This email is purely informational and does not include an invitation. I look forward to hearing from you soon as we plan our first meeting for the upcoming book club.
